stemHtml: A large commercial aeroplane is performing a test flight. It maintains level flight and reduced speed towards the indicated stick-shaker speed. If all Angle of Attack (AoA) sensors become frozen at an angle corresponding to level flight, stall warning and protection system will…

options.a: Function properly because the AoA information will be disregarded.
options.b: Function properly by alternate inputs from the Air Data Computer.
options.c: NOT trigger at all or NOT function as expected.
options.d: NOT be affected because their source is pitch and speed information.
